sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The player moved UP. Let me check if the left blue square changed color (from c to G) and try to collect it with SPACE.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'c', 'W', 'G']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(28, 38):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][14:28] if len(ascii_lines[i]) > 28 else ascii_lines[i]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
